case_title: HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP VS. MARK LUKNI

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP AS TO RESPONDENT LUKNI, MARK JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF PETITION AND PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

POS BY MAIL OF NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; MEMO OF P/A; PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.(AWARD IN THE SUM OF $32,910.39) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-23-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LUKNI, MARK $32,910.39 PRINCIPAL, $5,089.83 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38,040.22, SEE SCANNED DOC
